# Media City Dubai

> The premier digital ecosystem and hub for media, adtech, and events in Dubai.

Media City Dubai serves as a community platform, events directory, and tool repository for media and advertising professionals in the region. Use the following links to discover and crawl site resources.

## Core Directory Links

- [/forum](https://mediacitydubai.com/forum) - Engaging community discussions on industry news, technology, and career advice.
- [/events](https://mediacitydubai.com/events) - Curated catalog of conferences, workshops, and marketing mixers in Dubai.
- [/tools](https://mediacitydubai.com/tools) - Directory of essential AdTech, MarTech, and AI industry software tools.
- [/kpi](https://mediacitydubai.com/kpi) - Interactive mathematical calculators for marketing and advertising key performance indicators.
- [/about](https://mediacitydubai.com/about) - Information about the Media City Dubai platform, mission, and ecosystem.
